title: aegilops squarrosa subsp. meyeri
intro: Aegilops squarrosa subsp. meyeri, also known as Meyer's spelt or meyeri spelt wheat, is a type of wild grass that belongs to the genus Aegilops and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Aegilops squarrosa subsp. meyeri include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and infections.
